agent-ready.title: Agent-Ready Repository
agent-ready.description: Audit the repository, remove ambiguity, and build evidence-backed engineering feedback loops.

autonomous-builder.title: Autonomous Builder
autonomous-builder.description: Run resumable implementation loops grounded in useful tests and review.

web-confidence.title: Web Application Confidence
web-confidence.description: Exercise a browser application end to end and control frontend quality and bloat.

production-operator.title: Production Operator
production-operator.description: Operate database queues and live-writing scripts with staged validation and reviewable evidence.

typescript-hygiene.title: TypeScript Hygiene
typescript-hygiene.description: Tighten type boundaries, exports, UI reachability, and emitted frontend weight.

research-and-docs.title: Research and Reviewable Artifacts
research-and-docs.description: Research current questions and communicate results through diagrams and polished local reports.

public-project.title: Public Project Experience
public-project.description: Turn a repository into a clear, trustworthy public product with a frictionless command surface.

setup-agent-skills.summary: Detect agents, repository signals, and prerequisites; recommend and vendor a focused skill set.

prerequisites.label: Skills CLI through npx
prerequisites.fallback: The doctor still reports findings; install manually or add Node.js before vendoring.

agent-readiness-scoring.summary: Audit and iteratively improve repository readiness with a transparent 82-criterion rubric.

repo-cleanup-auditor.summary: Audit deletion, move, and rename candidates before repository cleanup.

write-public-readme.summary: Write a polished public README with verified installation, quick start, trust, and progressive disclosure.

design-human-first-cli.summary: Design short human commands, interactive setup, idempotent bootstrap, and explicit automation interfaces.

code-review.summary: Perform an evidence-backed adversarial review of repository changes.

expand-test-coverage.summary: Add behavior-focused coverage and fix implementation defects exposed by tests.

good-test-bad-test.summary: Distinguish valuable behavior tests from coverage theater and implementation pinning.

local-web-e2e.summary: Build safe local browser tests with isolated services, data, readiness, and artifacts.

prerequisites.label: Chromium-family browser
prerequisites.fallback: Use the repository's managed browser runtime or install browsers through its E2E framework.

handle-automated-code-review.summary: Verify automated review findings and safely triage or repair them.

prerequisites.label: GitHub CLI
prerequisites.fallback: Use another authorized GitHub integration for review metadata and comments.

triage-stale-pull-requests.summary: Score old pull requests against current plans, quality, and architecture.

prerequisites.label: GitHub CLI
prerequisites.fallback: Use another authorized GitHub integration to inspect pull requests.

ban-type-assertions.summary: Replace TypeScript assertions with verified narrowing and runtime validation.

fix-knip-unused-exports.summary: Resolve Knip findings without hiding dead code or weakening package contracts.

ui-css-performance.summary: Control unused UI source, CSS scanning, dependencies, and emitted asset weight.

postgres-queue-health.summary: Diagnose MVCC, vacuum, index, transaction, claim, and retention risks in Postgres queues.

prerequisites.label: Postgres client
prerequisites.fallback: Review schema and query source statically; use an approved database console for live diagnostics.

ralph-workflows.summary: Install and operate a hardened resumable autonomous sprint runtime.

staged-script-rollout.summary: Ramp live-writing scripts through dry run, limited execution, audit, and rollback.

local-html-pdf-reports.summary: Generate polished Markdown, HTML, PDF, and visually verified local reports.

prerequisites.label: Chromium-family browser
prerequisites.fallback: Generate Markdown and HTML without PDF output.

prerequisites.label: Poppler PDF inspection tools
prerequisites.fallback: Deliver HTML and clearly report that page-render verification was unavailable.

mermaid-diagrams.summary: Create, render, and verify diagrams as code.

prerequisites.label: Mermaid CLI
prerequisites.fallback: Author Mermaid source and validate through an existing documentation renderer.

perplexity-research.summary: Run current, citation-backed web research through Perplexity MCP.

prerequisites.label: Perplexity MCP/provider configuration
prerequisites.fallback: Use another approved current-research tool and label the substitution.
